title.en: WEAPON SIGHTS; AIMING (optical aspects thereof G02B)

Sighting devices (for indirect laying of fire F41G3/16; bombsights F41G3/24  {; structurally associated with laser telemeters F41G3/065; mounting tubular or beam shaped aiming devices on firearms F41G11/001})
characterised by the visual combination effect of the respective geometrical forms of fore and rear sight (F41G1/42 takes precedence)

Rearsights

for vehicle-borne armament, e.g. on aircraft

Devices for testing or checking

using electric means for remote control
